name: GT-jb-orderunit-3310
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2552 (3.3.10 Proposition), VERBATIM: "If A is a unital JB algebra, then A is a complete order unit space with the ordering induced by $A_+$ and order unit the identity 1. The order norm is the given one, and $a \in A$ satisfies $-1 \le a \le 1$ implies $0 \le a^2 \le 1$." Hence V=B(H)_sa is an order unit space with order unit 1.
